sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11028" key="a)cio/qeos1" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀξιό-θεος</orth> (A), <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">θεός</etym>) <sense id="n11028.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">worthy of God,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Oenom.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg2018.tlg001:5:34" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Eus.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">PE</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">5.34</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
